input.command:
cd /tmp/ripio-skills-pr && git add .claude-plugin/marketplace.json skills/nerif/ skills/appsec-tm/ && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add nerif and appsec-tm skills

- nerif: ULTRA-NERIF strategic intelligence oracle with Anti-Hype Protocol,
  domain packs (AppSec, AI/ML), and 5 operation modes (investigation,
  digest, landscape, comparison, radar). Digests persist to .nerif-digests/
  in the working directory for cross-session continuity.

- appsec-tm: STRIDE + DREAD threat modeling skill. Generates RRA CSV with
  scored threats and JIRA-ready markdown summary. Adapted from standalone
  bash wrapper to native CC skill format.

Both skills use relative paths (references/, resources/) following the
existing repo conventions. All output in Spanish.

built with ❤️‍🔥 by AppSec
EOF
)" 2>&1
